{"step_by_step_thinking": "The term 'chewing stroke' is not directly mentioned in the provided documents. However, in dental and orthodontic literature, 'CO' refers to centric occlusion and 'CR' refers to centric relation. Centric relation is the vertical and horizontal position of the mandible relative to the maxilla when the temporomandibular joints are in their most superior and anterior position.
